# 🔌 MCP Server (115)

Plug new powers straight into Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-aware client. Each one exposes tools, data, or APIs your assistant can call on the spot.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

- [modelcontextprotocol/servers](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers) — ⭐ 86,530 · `TypeScript` · Productivity — This is the official collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, designed to connect AI models like Claude to external services such as GitHub, databases, filesystems, Slack, Google Drive, and other APIs, enabling them to function as comprehensive personal assistants.
- [upstash/context7](https://github.com/upstash/context7) — ⭐ 56,438 · `TypeScript` · Code — Context7 is a platform that provides up-to-date code documentation specifically designed for Large Language Models and AI code editors.
- [mindsdb/minds-platform](https://github.com/mindsdb/minds-platform) — ⭐ 39,239 · `Python` · Productivity — MindsDB is an open-source AI platform that serves as an AI operating system, enabling users to build, control, and deploy production-ready AI systems. It integrates various LLMs and services like Notion, email, and calendar, allowing agents to automate tasks by interacting with web pages, files, and terminals.
- [microsoft/playwright-mcp](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp) — ⭐ 32,330 · `TypeScript` · Browser — This is an MCP server implementation that integrates Playwright, enabling LLMs to perform browser automation, scraping, and page inspection tasks.
- [czlonkowski/n8n-mcp](https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp) — ⭐ 20,008 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — This repository offers an MCP (Model Control Plane) to integrate with AI tools such as Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Windsurf, and Cursor. Its primary function is to assist users in building n8n workflows, leveraging AI for automation.
- [googleapis/mcp-toolbox](https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox) — ⭐ 15,434 · `Go` · Infrastructure — An open source MCP (Management Control Plane) server for databases, designed to connect AI agents directly to various enterprise databases such as BigQuery, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB, enabling efficient and secure database interaction for agents.
- [triggerdotdev/trigger.dev](https://github.com/triggerdotdev/trigger.dev) — ⭐ 15,081 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — Trigger.dev is a platform that allows developers to build, deploy, and manage fully-orchestrated AI agents and complex workflows, offering capabilities like background jobs and serverless execution.
- [yusufkaraaslan/Skill\_Seekers](https://github.com/yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers) — ⭐ 13,478 · `Python` · Text — Skill Seekers is a Python tool that converts diverse documentation sources like websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills, enhancing Claude's contextual understanding. - [xpzouying/xiaohongshu-mcp](https://github.com/xpzouying/xiaohongshu-mcp) — ⭐ 13,272 · `Go` · Productivity — An MCP (Multi-Channel Publishing) server for Xiaohongshu.com, automating operational tasks like persistent login, rich media publishing, searching, and fetching recommendations, with AI assistant integration.

- [grab/cursor-talk-to-figma-mcp](https://github.com/grab/cursor-talk-to-figma-mcp) — ⭐ 6,800 · `JavaScript` · Code — This project provides an MCP integration that allows AI agents like Cursor and Claude Code to communicate with Figma, enabling them to programmatically read and modify design files.
- [chopratejas/headroom](https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom) — ⭐ 6,649 · `Python` · Text — This tool compresses LLM inputs such as tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks, significantly reducing token usage (60-95%) while maintaining answer quality. - [fendouai/CodexSaver](https://github.com/fendouai/CodexSaver) — ⭐ 138 · `Python` · Code — An MCP (Multi-Model Cooperation) tool that optimizes the use of AI coding assistants like Codex. It delegates low-risk tasks to cheaper models while reserving more expensive models for critical coding decisions, aiming to significantly reduce costs.
- [ai-twinkle/Hub](https://github.com/ai-twinkle/Hub) — ⭐ 138 · Infrastructure — Twinkle Hub acts as a Middle-ware Client Proxy (MCP) as a Service, allowing AI clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Codex to access Taiwan government open data, procurement records, and specific tools via a single API. This repo appears to be for community feedback for their service.
- [mathomhaus/guild](https://github.com/mathomhaus/guild) — ⭐ 125 · `Go` · Code — A local-first server (single Go binary with SQLite) that provides shared context, memory, and task coordination for multiple AI coding agents, featuring hybrid keyword and semantic search capabilities. It includes concepts like Quests, Lore, Oath, and Brief for agent management.
- [glifxyz/glif-mcp-server](https://github.com/glifxyz/glif-mcp-server) — ⭐ 112 · `TypeScript` · Image — This MCP server allows LLMs to access glif.app AI workflows for multimedia generation, including image creation, memes, and selfies, by supporting major AI models.
- [Episkey-G/GrokSearch-rs](https://github.com/Episkey-G/GrokSearch-rs) — ⭐ 108 · `Rust` · Text — A Rust-based MCP (Multi-Agent Conversation Protocol) server that provides AI clients with real-time web search and source retrieval capabilities, utilizing Grok API and Tavily/Firecrawl.
- [aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws](https://github.com/aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws) — ⭐ 94 · `Python` · Infrastructure — This official AWS toolkit provides MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build and operate on AWS, enabling them to call AWS APIs, run scripts, search documentation, and retrieve skills.
- [deonmenezes/mantishack](https://github.com/deonmenezes/mantishack) — ⭐ 87 · `Rust` · Security — Mantis Hack is a daemon-driven, automated security research platform designed to provide evidence-grade results for bug bounty hunting and offensive security operations.
- [infranodus/mcp-server-infranodus](https://github.com/infranodus/mcp-server-infranodus) — ⭐ 87 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — This is the official server for InfraNodus, designed to integrate InfraNodus knowledge graphs into Large Language Model (LLM) workflows. It serves as a foundational backend component for AI systems utilizing knowledge graphs.
- [achiya-automation/safari-mcp](https://github.com/achiya-automation/safari-mcp) — ⭐ 74 · `JavaScript` · Browser — This repository provides native Safari browser automation for AI agents using AppleScript. It offers 80 tools, runs silently in the background, and serves as an efficient alternative to Chrome DevTools MCP, particularly on Apple Silicon.
- [YosefHayim/ebay-mcp](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp) — ⭐ 59 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — This is an open-source local Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants comprehensive access to eBay's Sell APIs. It includes 325 tools for various e-commerce functions like inventory management, order fulfillment, and marketing.
- [omermaksutii/mnemo](https://github.com/omermaksutii/mnemo) — ⭐ 49 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — Mnemo is an MCP server that provides persistent memory for Claude Code, allowing the AI to recall past project decisions and preferences across sessions. It uses ONNX MiniLM embeddings and an HNSW vector index for semantic retrieval, storing data locally in SQLite.
- [mirno-ehf/ue5-mcp](https://github.com/mirno-ehf/ue5-mcp) — ⭐ 45 · `C++` · Gaming — This is an Unreal Engine 5 plugin that enables AI agents, specifically through Claude Code, to edit Blueprints by understanding natural language descriptions.
- [edkdev/defi-trading-mcp](https://github.com/edkdev/defi-trading-mcp) — ⭐ 42 · `JavaScript` · Finance — This server enables an AI assistant to operate as an autonomous DeFi crypto trading agent, offering a comprehensive toolset for real-time trading across multiple blockchains. It includes market analysis, gasless swaps, and MEV protection, all controllable via natural language.
- [aaronsb/knowledge-graph-system](https://github.com/aaronsb/knowledge-graph-system) — ⭐ 41 · `Python` · Text — Kappa Graph is a semantic knowledge graph system designed to extract concepts, measure grounding strength, preserve disagreement, and trace all information back to its source. It provides a weighted and evidence-based view of knowledge.
- [eric-tramel/moraine](https://github.com/eric-tramel/moraine) — ⭐ 38 · `Rust` · Infrastructure — Moraine is a unified real-time database and search engine built to store and enable fast retrieval of traces from AI agent interactions. It provides a server and CLI tool for managing and querying agent session data, optimized for observability in agentic AI workflows.
- [agent-sh/computer-use-linux](https://github.com/agent-sh/computer-use-linux) — ⭐ 35 · `Rust` · Productivity — This MCP server enables AI Agents to natively control Linux desktop applications by interacting with AT-SPI, GNOME Shell, Wayland, and ydotool, facilitating inputs, clicks, and window management without relying on screenshot OCR.
- [EfrainTorres/armavita-meta-ads-mcp](https://github.com/EfrainTorres/armavita-meta-ads-mcp) — ⭐ 34 · `Python` · Infrastructure — This repository provides an MCP (Meta Cloud Platform) server for interacting with the Meta Marketing API, specifically for Instagram and Facebook ads. It offers functionalities for managing campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, insights, and reports, with features like secure token handling.
- [open-ma/open-managed-agents](https://github.com/open-ma/open-managed-agents) — ⭐ 31 · `TypeScript` · Code — This is an open-source, self-hosted implementation of Claude's Managed Agents API, designed to be drop-in compatible and run on Cloudflare Workers or Node. It provides the infrastructure for developers to build and manage their own AI agents locally.
- [veniceai/venice-mcp-server](https://github.com/veniceai/venice-mcp-server) — ⭐ 26 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — An official Venice AI MCP (Multi-modal Communication Protocol) Server that integrates 31 tools across various modalities including chat, image, video, audio, music, and web search. It acts as a backend for AI agents like Hermes or OpenClaw, and clients such as Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
- [chrisryugj/hermes-dashboard](https://github.com/chrisryugj/hermes-dashboard) — ⭐ 21 · `HTML` · Infrastructure — A web-based dashboard for the Hermes Agent gateway, offering full configuration, MCP, cron job scheduling, and model management without relying on the command-line interface.
- [fluyeporlaweb/mcp-x-intelligence](https://github.com/fluyeporlaweb/mcp-x-intelligence) — ⭐ 17 · `TypeScript` · Data — This is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides AI agents with research capabilities on X/Twitter data. It's designed to be compatible with tools like Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-enabled AI agents.
- [mikusnuz/meta-ads-mcp](https://github.com/mikusnuz/meta-ads-mcp) — ⭐ 17 · `TypeScript` · Infrastructure — An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for the Meta Marketing API, providing 135 tools for managing Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns. It serves as a backend for AI agents interacting with ad platforms.
- [Nonanti/narwhal](https://github.com/Nonanti/narwhal) — ⭐ 16 · `Rust` · Data — A terminal-based database client that connects to multiple SQL databases like Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite. It features a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, allowing AI assistants like Claude Desktop or Cursor to directly query database schemas.
- [PDBeurope/PDBe-MCP-Servers](https://github.com/PDBeurope/PDBe-MCP-Servers) — ⭐ 14 · `Python` · Science — This repository provides Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that integrate Protein Data Bank Europe resources with Large Language Models. It offers seamless access to protein structure data via API tools and aids in generating intelligent Cypher queries for structural biology research.
- [elastic/example-mcp-dashbuilder](https://github.com/elastic/example-mcp-dashbuilder) — ⭐ 11 · `TypeScript` · Data — This is an example application for the Elastic Multimodal Conversation Platform (MCP) that enables users to build interactive Kibana dashboards within AI conversations. It queries Elasticsearch data using ES\|QL and automatically selects appropriate chart types.
- [4kk11/RhinoMCPServer](https://github.com/4kk11/RhinoMCPServer) — ⭐ 10 · `C#` · Other — This project proposes an MCP server design with a plugin architecture, likely within the Rhino environment. It aims to provide a unified core framework for developing and distributing community-contributed tools.
